infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX 17 - 19 July 2026 The team representative is required to report to the Stewards at 19:10 in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Scuderia Ferrari HP Document 28 Date 17 July 2026 Time 18:55 No / Driver 16 - Charles Leclerc Reason

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX
17 - 19 July 2026
The team representative is required to report to the Stewards at 19:10 in relation to the incident
below:
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Scuderia Ferrari HP
Document 28
Date 17 July 2026
Time 18:55
No / Driver 16 - Charles Leclerc
Reason Alleged breach of Article B6.4.2 of the FIA F1 Regulations – Failure to return tyres
which have been electronically returned after FP1. Refer to Technical Delegate's
report (document 24).
Gerd Ennser Matthew Selley
Alfonso Orihuela Pedro Lamy
Loïc Bacquelaine
